title: anthocephalus indicus
intro: Anthocephalus indicus, also known as the king of forest tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Anthocephalus indicus include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting immune function and reducing oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of leaves, bark, or roots, and is commonly consumed as a tea or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
